name: Allogenic adipose MSC exosomes Alzheimer's phase I/II trial
summary: Open-label single-center 3+3 dose-escalation phase I/II trial of intranasal allogenic adipose MSC-derived exosomes in mild to moderate Alzheimer's disease.
population: Adults at least 50 years old with mild to moderate Alzheimer's disease

trial_details.horizon_note: Peer-reviewed results are already in the public evidence layer; ClinicalTrials.gov still has no posted registry results in the June 15, 2026 API view.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Extracellular Vesicle and Secretome Therapies because they can show whether the intervention changes function, biomarkers, and safety in Adults at least 50 years old with mild to moderate Alzheimer's disease. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
